# trss-events-list



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                             | Type      | Default                                                    |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| `image`    | `image`    | Whether or not to display the event teaser.             | `boolean` | `false`                                                    |
| `layout`   | `layout`   | Layout style of the event list.                         | `string`  | `'list'`                                                   |
| `limit`    | `limit`    | Limit the number of items displayed.                    | `number`  | `5`                                                        |
| `location` | `location` | Whether or not to display the event location.           | `boolean` | `false`                                                    |
| `source`   | `source`   | The JSON source for the content list in this component. | `string`  | `'https://events.ucsc.edu/wp-json/tribe/events/v1/events'` |
| `teaser`   | `teaser`   | Whether or not to display the event teaser.             | `boolean` | `false`                                                    |
